title: Louisiana Community Economic Development Act
doc_html:
SUBPART B-39.  LOUISIANA COMMUNITY ECONOMIC

DEVELOPMENT ACT

§130.751.  Louisiana Community Economic Development Act

This Subpart may be cited as the "Louisiana Community Economic Development Act".

Acts 2007, No. 374, §1, eff. July 10, 2007.
